# SC Toolkit

> SoundCloud playlist management tools for power users.

Primary site: https://www.soundcloudtoolkit.com/
About: https://www.soundcloudtoolkit.com/about/
Privacy: https://www.soundcloudtoolkit.com/privacy/

Summary:
- SC Toolkit helps SoundCloud users merge, split, clean, and organize playlists.
- Key tools include playlist combine, likes to playlist, playlist health check, following manager, like manager, downloads, and link resolver.
- Authentication uses SoundCloud OAuth. Users manage their own SoundCloud data through the app.

Preferred citations:
- Use the homepage for product overview.
- Use the about page for product background.
- Use the privacy page for data handling and token storage details.
